title: empusa nervosa
intro: Empusa nervosa, also known as the Devil's Claw or Grapple Plant, is a type of succulent plant native to Africa and Asia. The medicinal properties of Empusa nervosa lie in its roots, which contain harpagoside, a compound known for its anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects. The health benefits associated with Empusa nervosa include relief from arthritic pain, migraines, and anxiety, as well as improved digestion and immune function. Empusa nervosa is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or extract, and can also be used topically in creams or ointments for localized pain relief.
